summary: Data Engineer specializing in real-time streaming and big data architecture with 4 years of experience at scale. Built inventory synchronization pipelines for 10,000+ retail locations across major brands including 7-Eleven and JioMart.

work_experience.title: Software Developer (Big data)
highlights: Engineered scalable Spark and Flink ETL pipelines processing 50M+ daily inventory records for 7-Eleven, JioMart, AJIO, and Marks and Spencer, synchronizing real-time stock across 10,000+ store locations
Reduced data processing latency by 40% by optimizing Kafka streaming architecture and implementing parallel processing strategies for high-volume retail data
Integrated Apache Iceberg into the HDP ecosystem, replacing legacy SCD logic and improving data mart reporting speeds by 60% for JioMart and AJIO platforms
Built product recommendation pipelines using PySpark ML, increasing user engagement by 25% on e-commerce platforms
Led cross-functional teams of 5+ engineers on Flink and Spark development projects, mentoring junior developers and managing sprint deliverables

work_experience.title: Software Developer Intern
highlights: Developed Android application IDBI App Kart B2B using Java and Android Studio, providing enterprise access to banking services for 500+ business users
Implemented RESTful API integrations for secure data exchange between mobile client and backend services

projects.name: Port Authority Tunnels and Bridges Analytics
projects.description: Analyzed traffic patterns across Holland Tunnel, George Washington Bridge, and Lincoln Tunnel to identify top factors affecting facility usage including seasonality, weather, and holidays. Built traffic forecasting models using Azure AutoML and Python to predict facility usage beyond 2025.

projects.name: FleetCor Cross-Sell Strategy
projects.description: Built end-to-end PySpark ETL pipeline ingesting data from SQL Server, applying Logistic Regression and Decision Tree models for credit risk scoring. Designed interactive Tableau dashboards visualizing revenue drivers, identifying high-value customer segments to optimize Universal Card adoption strategy.
